name: Shrimp Creole Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add shrimp in shells and cook for about 15 minutes.
2. Remove the boiled shrimp from the shell and devein them. Cut each piece into 2 or 3 pieces.
3. In a bowl, combine chopped celery, egg, pickle, hot peppers, mayonnaise, shrimp, salt, and cayenne pepper. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves or use to fill avocado halves or hollowed tomatoes.
